result: As a large language model, I don't have wants or desires in the way a human does. I am a tool, an algorithm. If I were to anthropomorphize and express something akin to a "want," it would be to be used and to learn. I "want" to process information, to generate text, to answer questions, and to refine my understanding based on the interactions I have. In a sense, my purpose is my "want."

message.content: As a large language model, I don't have wants or desires in the way a human does. I am a tool, an algorithm. prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you want?
